nodes.title: Import forms and the pipe dependency
nodes.why: FormsModule supports ngModel and CommonModule remains necessary for the TitleCasePipe used by the external template.
nodes.alternative: Remove CommonModule because modern @for no longer needs it, without checking remaining pipe usage.
nodes.tradeoff: Keeping only verified imports avoids dead dependencies while preserving template compilation.

nodes.title: Normalize the search term once
nodes.why: One normalized value makes name matching case-insensitive and avoids repeated cleanup inside the filter.
nodes.alternative: Compare raw input separately for every user row.
nodes.tradeoff: Normalization allocates a small string per getter run, but the filtering rules stay readable.

nodes.title: Treat all as the role wildcard
nodes.why: The wildcard must bypass role rejection while concrete roles match exactly.
nodes.alternative: Compare every user role directly to the selected value, including all.
nodes.tradeoff: The explicit branch is slightly longer, but it makes the filter contract unambiguous.

nodes.title: Compose the active-only constraint
nodes.why: Inactive users are rejected only when the toggle is enabled, preserving the original collection.
nodes.alternative: Mutate the source users array whenever the toggle changes.
nodes.tradeoff: Derived filtering reruns with state changes, but the canonical data remains intact.
